summary: Bootstrap: GH repo + GECK/ scaffold; corrected generator Python→Rust default in LLM_init; rewrote tasks.md to spec §11 build order; filed DECISION-001
Phase 1 complete: workspace scaffold + licenses + CI + release; build/fmt/clippy-pedantic all clean; rustmote --help exposes full §4.1 subcommand surface
Vendored RUSTMOTE_SPEC.md into repo root; updated LLM_init.md and README.md cross-references to in-repo path
Phase 2 complete: CredentialMode+Target+RemoteServer types, Config TOML load/save with OS-appropriate path + atomic write, registry CRUD, 21 unit + 3 integration tests green

Phase 3 complete: Prompt/Keychain/Unsafe dispatch via CredentialStore enum, KeyringBackend trait for mock keyring, 0600 enforcement on Unix + hard refusal on non-Unix, tracing::warn on every unsafe access; 27 unit + 11 integration tests green; zero unsafe Rust maintained per spec §6.5

Phase 4 complete: russh-based Session with Arc<Handle>, HostKeyHandler implementing TOFU via known_hosts.toml (TrustOnFirstUse | Strict policies), key-first/password-fallback auth, local->remote port forward via direct-tcpip with tokio::io::split bidirectional pump, RemoteExec async_trait for relay_lifecycle mocks, 39 unit + 15 integration tests green, zero unsafe maintained

Phase 5 complete alongside CI recovery: TargetId validated newtype + Viewer detection (Native/Flatpak) with in-process PATH lookup and per-OS candidate order per §3.5, argv via Command::arg only; DECISION-002 bumps MSRV 1.75->1.85 with resolver v3 for MSRV-aware dep selection; 3 broken rustdoc intra-doc links rewritten; Windows scratch_path gated cfg(unix); 48 unit + 15 integration tests green, zero unsafe maintained
